title: Armor Swapper
description: Quickly swap your armor by right clicking them inside your inventory!
body: ![Armor Swapper Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7aeb7c1a478a49db6e5291e640fb347988a780c.png) --- [](https://discord.gg/tqn38v6w7k) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) Armor Swapper is a mod that lets you quickly swap armor pieces inside your inventory by right clicking on them! --- ## Showcase ![Mod Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FySjutton/profile-images/refs/heads/main/2025-09-16_14.40.58_recording.webp) ## Check out my other mods
